<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 21 MB</p>
<p>THE POSTCARD KING! Jessica and Typhoid Mary finally get their hands on their prime suspect... THE POSTCARD KING, a deranged man who uses letters to influence his victims. But as they untangle his ramblings, a darker truth emerges — a secret network of murderers may be at play. But who is the puppet master pulling their strings?</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/marvel/alias-red-band-3-2026/">Alias &#8211; Red Band #3 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
